title: The 2019 Spirit of KUAC award goes to Patty Kastelic
summary: “KUAC is a treasure,” said Patty Kastelic, the public broadcasting station’s volunteer of the year. Kastelic, the 2019 Spirit of KUAC awardee, is not only a volunteer, but a staunch advocate and champion for public broadcasting in Interior Alaska. “I immediately fell in love with KUAC; it became my...

title: Face to Face
summary: In February 2019, a group of Chugach Alaska Corporation (Chugach) employees and dignitaries, including CEO Gabriel Kompkoff and Chairman of the Board Sheri Buretta, paid a visit to Heidi & Cook (H&C), Chugach’s Hawaiian subsidiary.
